Dialog.name: MSG_ENTER_FUKA_NO_00
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 52 -1 0 0}I understand. You can never be too prepared.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_ENTER_FUKA_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 3 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 5089 0 0}Heading to the Desert of Doors, Aigis?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_ENTER_FUKA_OK_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 3 52 -1 0 0}All right... I'll let Metis know, then.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_ENTER_FUKA_NO_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 3 52 -1 0 0}Okay. Let me know when you're ready, then.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_ENTER_FUKA_02
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 5001 0 0}You want to go to the Desert of Doors?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_ENTER_FUKA_OK_02
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 1 52 -1 0 0}All right, I'll let everyone know... Good luck, Aigis.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_ENTER_FUKA_NO_02
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 52 -1 0 0}Okay then. I'll use this time to get myself ready, too.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_ENTER_JUNPEI_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 2001 0 0}Oh, by the way—Ai-chan, have you heard about this?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_ENTER_JUNPEI_02
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 52 -1 0 0}I guess the flower shop's opening a new branch at Paulownia Mall. They've been handing out flyers.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 52 -1 0 0}Doesn't mean much to me, but maybe you can check it out if you're interested.[n]{f 1 1}
